business.name: HAK Rapid Plumbing and Heating Services
business.tagline: Fast, Reliable Plumbing and Heating Solutions

sample_reviews.author: James M
sample_reviews.text: Called HAK Rapid after a burst pipe and they arrived within the hour. Professional, tidy and sorted the problem quickly. Highly recommend!

sample_reviews.author: Sarah T
sample_reviews.text: Excellent service from start to finish. New boiler installed efficiently and at a fair price. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: David R
sample_reviews.text: Very responsive and knowledgeable team. Fixed our central heating issue same day. Good value for money in Leeds.

brand.usp: HAK Rapid Plumbing and Heating Services delivers fast-response plumbing and heating solutions across Leeds and West Yorkshire, combining expert workmanship with transparent pricing and round-the-clock emergency availability.
brand.hero_headline: Leeds Trusted Rapid Plumbing and Heating Experts
brand.about_paragraph: We are HAK Rapid Plumbing and Heating Services, and we have been proudly serving homeowners and businesses across Leeds and the wider West Yorkshire area. We specialise in everything from emergency repairs and boiler installations to full central heating systems, always arriving promptly and getting the job done right. Our team is Gas Safe registered, fully insured, and committed to delivering honest, high-quality workmanship at competitive prices.
